Another miracle of the last days when Judah returns home is that the waters of the Dead Sea "shall be healed" at least to the extent that "fish of the great sea" can live therein. At the present time the Dead Sea is approximately 27 percent salt, while the normal seas of the earth are about 5 percent. Although not all the areas around the Dead Sea will be healed ("the marishes thereof shall not…

Another miracle of the last days when Judah returns home is that the waters of the Dead Sea "shall be healed" at least to the extent that "fish of the great sea" can live therein. At the present time the Dead Sea is approximately 27 percent salt, while the normal seas of the earth are about 5 percent.
